title: Integer Replacement
hints: Consider the problem as finding the shortest path in a graph where nodes are integers and edges represent allowed operations.
Use Breadth-First Search (BFS) starting from n to find the minimum steps to reach 1, treating each operation as a move to a neighbor.
Optimize by noting that for odd numbers, choosing n+1 or n-1 depends on which leads to a number divisible by 4, reducing the search space significantly.
